title: YouGarden Hydrangea 'Rosemary Foster', 3 x 9cm Pots, Purple Blue Flowers, Chocolate Leaves, Ready to Plant Shrubs
features: UNIQUE SUMMER BLOOMS: Huge clusters of rich purple-blue flowers with white florets, flowering from June into early autumn. Bring bold seasonal colour to the borders and shaded spots of your garden.
STRIKING FOLIAGE CONTRAST: Deep green leaves with chocolate-coloured undersides provide structure and textural contrast even outside of the flowering season.
LOW MAINTENANCE SHRUBS: Grows to around 1.2m tall and wide. Little pruning is needed and they are fully hardy in UK gardens. These shrubs attract pollinators and thrive in partial shade.
DETAILS: Supplied as a set of three established plants in 9cm pots. Ready to grow on and plant out on arrival. Water well and plant into moist, well-drained soil for best results.

ABOUT US: At YouGarden, we believe that gardening is for everyone. Based in rural Lincolnshire we have our own 11 acre nursery, meaning that we are in close contact with our plants, so that we can guarantee our plants will thrive because we've grown them ourselves. We also source product locally, nationally and internationally to ensure we give our customers the best range, highest quality and greatest value for money. All our products will arrive in nursery fresh condition.
description: Hydrangea shrubs with real wow factor! 'Rosemary Foster' is one that always delivers. Not just another variety, these collector's items are refined and unusual. Letâ€s start with the flowers. These are deep, velvety purple-blue, with each head framed with elegant white ray florets for a striking two-tone effect, lighting up the garden from June into early autumn. They're the kind of flowers that stop you in your tracks, not just for their colour but their structure too. And the foliage deserves just as much praise. Deep green on top with unexpected chocolate-brown undersides, the leaves bring texture and richness even when the plants aren't in flower. In a lightly shaded border, that contrast really comes to life. These are compact, bushy hydrangea, reaching around 1.2m tall and wide, ideal for beds, borders, woodland gardens or even generous containers. They thrive in moist but well-drained soil and benefit from shelter from harsh afternoon sun, although they are fully hardy through winter. Pollinators love them, and the flowering season stretches right through the later summer months. They're low maintenance too, so just a light tidy in spring and youâ€re good to go. Supplied as a set of three established plants in 9cm pots, ready to plant.

specifications_table.Moisture Needs: Regular Watering, Keep Soil Moist But Not Waterlogged
